subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, render thanks unto the Friend that thou art among the circle of them that are bewildered by His tresses and enamored of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن حضرت دوست را که در حلقه آشفتگان موی او و عاشقان روی او در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
